nasb.text: I will shake all the nations; and they will come with the wealth of all nations, and I will fill this house with glory,’ says the Lord of hosts.

esv.text: And I will shake all nations, so that the treasures of all nations shall come in, and I will fill this house with glory, says the Lord of hosts.

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華說：“我要震動萬國，萬國的珍寶就必運來；我要使這殿宇充滿榮耀。”

ccb.text: 万军之耶和华说，我要震动万国，万国的珍宝都要送到这殿，我要使这殿充满荣耀。
